title: scope-resilience — P41: Hallucination resilience mapping for LLM semantic paths
description:
Extends genesis-scope with a formal pre-flight hallucination risk assessment (Ρ_sem) for LLM semantic paths.

Ρ_sem(P, t) = r_sem · tanh²(σ · Γ_sem(P)) · (1 − Γ_sem(P)/Γ_max) · (1 − |dΓ_sem/dt| / Γ̇_critical) applies the same UTAC fixpoint-resilience formalism used by resilience-core (P40) to LLM coherence maintenance: before initialising a model on a semantic topic path, quantify how resilient that path is against hallucination-driving semantic drift.

Implements all 6 GenesisAeon Diamond methods including get_resilience_state(), a domain-calibrated grounding recommender, live Γ_sem drift monitoring, an optional MCP server, and the first GenesisAeon implementation of llms.txt export.

Domain r_sem values are a pre-registered hypothesis pending TIP/P49 calibration (≥30 perturbation-pair measurements per domain).

Part of the GenesisAeon ecosystem (P41, domain: LLM semantic coherence / hallucination resilience).

See github.com/GenesisAeon/scope-resilience for source and documentation.
